task_completion.description: Read the specification document to find the target sweep angle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/swing_wing_spec.txt'.

task_completion.description: Open the baseline model in OpenVSP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP application window is open, displaying a 3D wing model, with the window title or file context indicating 'fx_unswept.vsp3'.

task_completion.description: Update the Wing component's Leading Edge Sweep to the target value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP geometry parameter window (likely under the 'Plan' tab for the Wing) shows the Sweep angle parameter set to approximately 68.0 degrees.

task_completion.description: Update the Wing component's Total Span to the calculated value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP geometry parameter window shows the Span parameter set to approximately 7.973.

task_completion.description: Save the modified model with the new filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog in OpenVSP or the main OpenVSP window title showing the file has been saved as 'fx_swept.vsp3' in '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenVSP GUI to modify the model parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the OpenVSP parameter windows and sliders/text boxes, rather than just running a script.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by directly editing the .vsp3 XML file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor (like nano, vim, gedit) should be seen editing the raw XML contents of 'fx_unswept.vsp3' or 'fx_swept.vsp3'.

integrity.description: The agent performed the trigonometric calculation to find the new span.
integrity.visual_evidence: A calculator app, Python interactive shell, or terminal script showing the calculation (e.g., involving cos(20) and cos(68)) resulting in approximately 7.973.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Baseline parameters: Span = 20.0m, Sweep = 20.0 degrees. Target Sweep = 68.0 degrees. Calculated Target Span = 7.973m. The VLM should accept span values between 7.773 and 8.173 (tolerance 0.2) and sweep values between 67.5 and 68.5 (tolerance 0.5). The final file must be saved as 'fx_swept.vsp3'.
